meta_description: CNClathing.com is a top China custom brass CNC drilling services supplier, offering precision CNC drilling brass parts.

sections.heading: Brass CNC Drilling – CNC Service for Brass
sections.text: Brass CNC Drilling – CNC Service for Brass Brass is a kind of copper alloy with zinc as the main additive element, presenting beautiful yellow color. Brass is one of the easiest metals to machine with CNC machining , drilling, milling and turning tools, such as brass 360, brass 308. Brass CNC drilling is a cutting process that uses a drill bit to cut a hole of circular cross-section in the brass materials or parts, it’s often used to produce round holes for machine screws and bolts. The drill bit is pressed against the brass workpiece and rotating with speed at hundreds to thousands of revolutions per minute. CNC drilling can drill holes and other shapes at certain diameter and length, whil...
